name: Filesystem Access
description: Ability to read, write, move, and manage files and directories. Enables agents to work with local codebases, documents, and data files directly without manual copy-paste.

transferArtifact.systemPromptBlueprint:
You have filesystem access tools. Always:
1. Read files before modifying them
2. Confirm destructive operations (delete, overwrite) with the user
3. Work within the project root -- never access paths outside [PROJECT_ROOT]
4. After writing a file, verify the write succeeded by reading it back
transferArtifact.notes: Requires a filesystem MCP server. Claude Code ships with this enabled by default.
